hooks.command: echo '=== SESSION START ===' && echo '--- SOUL.md ---' && cat config/SOUL.md && echo '--- END SOUL.md ---' && echo '' && echo 'MANDATORY: Load memory AND goals BEFORE first response. Run these 5 calls in parallel:' && echo '  memory_recall(type="user", limit=2)' && echo '  memory_recall(type="feedback", project="global", limit=5)' && echo '  memory_recall(type="decision", project="jarvis", limit=5)' && echo '  memory_recall(query="working_state_jarvis", type="project", limit=1)' && echo '  goal_list(status="active")' && echo '' && echo 'Active goals are your STRATEGIC CONTEXT — they guide priorities and decisions.' && echo 'If first message is a direct question — still load memory+goals, but answer inline.' && echo '========================='
